name: TalkTsurugiPeter
_source: s;Tsurugi;Wh-Whoa! Who blocked out the sun?
s;Peter;Please calm down. I'm not going to hurt you.|I'm only out here to drive away these bandits.
s;Tsurugi;You are?{c:e;Tsurugi;CloseEyes} Man, with how big you are, I thought you were one of them.
s;Peter;I assure you that I am not.

s;Tsurugi;Well, you haven't tried to attack me this entire conversation,|so I guess that means you're okay. Sorry for doubting you, sir.|{c:e;Tsurugi;HalfCloseEyes}I just don't do great with bandits and the like.
s;Tsurugi;Allow me to properly introduce myself. My name is Tsurugi.|I'm a merchant from Merinas now employed under the Medean army.
s;Peter;My name is Peter. It is good to make your acquaintence, Tsurugi.|Now, shall we take care of these bandits?
